problem:
[BUG] A2A - pydantic error, when AgentCard-skill-id <> endpoint url. (1.3.0). hi, using A2A. The host agent throws below error, because it compares the endpoint with the skill.id of the agent card, defined in the remote agent's client card.

pydantic_core._pydantic_core.ValidationError: 1 validation error for AgentResponse
a2a_ids.0
  Input should be 'http://localhost:10001/.well-known/agent-card.json' [type=literal_error, input_value='Research', input_type=str]
expected_solution_keywords: [BUG] A2A - pydantic error, when AgentCard-skill-id <> endpoint url. (1.3.0)
memory_hint: [BUG] A2A - pydantic error, when AgentCard-skill-id <> endpoint url. (1.3.0). to validate / assume, that agent card - skills - id is a unique ID for an agent is not realistic. It should be not used as a key. Endpoint is unique a. Increase timeout or reduce payload.
failure_without_memory:
1.) create a host crew with agent using A2a

    gen_agent = Agent(
        role="Generalist",
        goal="Coordinate tasks efficiently",
        backstory="Expert at delegating to specialized agent
environment:
workaround:

            id=f"{agent_host_url}.well-known/agent-card.json",
            name="Research",

will do the trick.
